intro: A plain roundup of the week's notable military and business technology (full analysis was unavailable this run).

deep_dives.title: U.S. Carries Out First Strike On Iran Since Peace Memorandum Signed (Updated)
deep_dives.what_happened: The attack was in response to an Iranian strike on a cargo vessel exiting the Strait of Hormuz yesterday. The post U.S. Carries Out First Strike On Iran Since Peace Memorandum Signed (Updated) appeared first on TWZ .

deep_dives.title: US strikes Iranian missile, drone, radar sites
deep_dives.what_happened: The U.S. struck Iranian missile, drone and radar sites on Friday, U.S. Central Command said.

deep_dives.title: How the Pentagon is shaping its next cyber strategy
deep_dives.what_happened: Drawing on Breaking Defense’s TechNet Cyber 2026 coverage, this eBook examines how the Pentagon is advancing AI, cybersecurity, and cyber strategy to strengthen the future force.

deep_dives.title: Bunker Talk: Let’s Talk About All The Things We Did And Didn’t Cover This Week
deep_dives.what_happened: Remember... sky? The post Bunker Talk: Let’s Talk About All The Things We Did And Didn’t Cover This Week appeared first on TWZ .

deep_dives.title: U.S. Navy Accepts Two Modernized Destroyers Ahead of Schedule
deep_dives.what_happened: The U.S. Navy took delivery of two modernized destroyers, USS Chung-Hoon (DDG 93) and USS James E. Williams (DDG 95), ahead of schedule through accelerated acquisition, planning, and execution milestones led by the service’s new Portfolio Acquisition Executive (PAE) Maritime office. Both ships completed their combat system sea trials, calibrations, and shakedowns successfully and ahead ... The post U.S. Navy Accepts Two Modernized Destroyers Ahead of Schedule appeared first on Naval News .

deep_dives.title: C-17 Cargo Jets Flowing To Caribbean For Venezuela Earthquake Relief Effort
deep_dives.what_happened: The flights are part of a growing U.S. military effort to provide humanitarian assistance to Venezuela. The post C-17 Cargo Jets Flowing To Caribbean For Venezuela Earthquake Relief Effort appeared first on TWZ .

deep_dives.title: It’s Official: F-35s Are Now Being Delivered Without Radars
deep_dives.what_happened: Delays in the delivery of new AN/APG-85 radars are deeply intertwined with other woes that continue to hound the F-35 program. The post It’s Official: F-35s Are Now Being Delivered Without Radars appeared first on TWZ .

deep_dives.title: NATO allies promised Trump they’d secure the Arctic; they’ve got work to do
deep_dives.what_happened: Through most of NATO’s eight-decade history, the inhospitable High North was low priority. That calculus is now changing.
